title: Gear Second Awakens — Part 4
description: Luffy unveils Gear Second against Blueno, changing the scale of the fight and showing CP9 that the Straw Hats have evolved.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Franky, Blueno, Luffy, Spandam, Nico Robin. Luffy unveils Gear Second against Blueno, changing the scale of the fight and showing CP9 that the Straw Hats have evolved.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: ... After I was defeated by Aokiji,

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Then I have to be stronger...

dialogue.speaker: CP9 agent
dialogue.text: Because otherwise I can't protect my Nakama...!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: ... I have Nakama who're not strong...

summary: Luffy unveils Gear Second against Blueno, changing the scale of the fight and showing CP9 that the Straw Hats have evolved.
